name: 5B Unit 4 - Role Models
description: 關於 Role Models 的閱讀理解問答
creator: 系統預置

questions.question: How long has Safina Lam been a voice actress?
questions.answer: She has been a voice actress since 2003.

questions.question: What does Safina think of her father?
questions.answer: She thinks her father was cheerful and gentle.

questions.question: Why does Ben want to be a voice actor?
questions.answer: It is because he loves watching cartoons.

questions.question: What happened to Fung Kam-hung in 1991?
questions.answer: He lost his left leg in a traffic accident.

questions.question: Who is your role model? What is he/she like?
questions.answer: My role model is my dad. He is caring and helpful.
